message:
fix(store): uppercase engine name in FUNCTION dump/restore header parse

FUNCTION DUMP emits the library header as `ENGINE name=<lib>`, and real
Redis writes the engine token in upper case ("LUA"). The parser was
preserving whatever case the on-disk header contained, which meant a
header produced by another Redis instance in mixed case could round-trip
to lower-case and then fail the FUNCTION RESTORE equality check against
the canonical engine list.

Normalize the first whitespace-delimited token to ASCII upper case when
parsing so "lua", "Lua", and "LUA" all produce the same `engine` string,
matching real Redis's behavior.
